objects.description: Thin vertical rectangle acting as the rod
Small circle acting as the pendulum weight

choreography.description: The rod and pendulum weight fade in together from opacity 0 to full visibility with ease-out-sin easing.

The rod swings left and right around the top anchor point with a pivot effect. The circle remains attached at the bottom. The swing amplitude is 30 degrees, using ease-in-out easing for a smooth motion.
The swinging motion slows down gradually, coming to a gentle stop at the center position. The final state holds for 1 second before fading out with ease-in-sin easing.
